name: prioritization-app
description: Prioritization Frameworks Web Application with AI Agent Pipeline

scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace=backend & npm run dev --workspace=frontend
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=frontend && npm run build --workspace=backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=frontend && npm run lint --workspace=backend
scripts.test: npm run test:run --workspace=frontend && npm run test:run --workspace=backend
scripts.test:run: npm run test:run --workspace=frontend && npm run test:run --workspace=backend
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage --workspace=frontend && npm run test:coverage --workspace=backend
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:e2e:chromium
